examples: Oligarch is a big and robust bear.
The Russian oligarch is the man with everything... except the prize he covets the most.
To some, his sacking was reminiscent of the arrest of Mikhail Khodorkovsky, a business oligarch, in 2003.
It said the fallen oligarch had been a "talented mathematician who became the great schemer".
Putin only needed to jail one oligarch (Khodorkovsky) in order to intimidate all the rest.
